title: Error reading fileName in Telegram Send Photo node
symptom: The Telegram Send Photo node throws an error stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'fileName')' when trying to send an image.
not_this_if: Error occurs when sending text messages
root_cause: The error occurs because the Telegram Send Photo node is attempting to access a property that does not exist in the incoming data structure. This typically happens when the expected binary data is not correctly referenced in the node's configuration.
fix_steps: Open the Telegram Send Photo node settings
Change the data reference from 'data0' to 'file'
Test the workflow again with the image data
agent_instruction: Change the data reference in the Telegram Send Photo node to 'file'.
